The '''''Slader's Raider II''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] that was owned and operated by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roark Slader]] during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
